text.title: AI Latency Waterfall Examples
text.summary: Worked example: support-agent waterfall showing cold-prefill as the dominant bottleneck.

example.title: Filled report
example.code: { "report_id": "waterfall-support-2026-05-22", "feature": "support-agent", "window": {"start":"2026-05-22T08:00:00Z","end":"2026-05-22T12:00:00Z"}, "n_samples": 240, "sla_target": {"percentile": "p95", "value_ms": 5000}, "segments": [ {"name":"ttfb","p50_ms":120,"p95_ms":180,"budget_ms":200,"status":"OK"}, {"name":"prefill_cold","p50_ms":1100,"p95_ms":1600,"budget_ms":800,"status":"OVER"}, {"name":"prefill_hit","p50_ms":140,"p95_ms":220,"budget_ms":300,"status":"OK"}, {"name":"decode","p50_ms":1800,"p95_ms":2400,"budget_ms":2500,"status":"OK"}, {"name":"tool_search","p50_ms":240,"p95_ms":410,"budget_ms":500,"status":"OK"}, {"name":"post_process","p50_ms":30,"p95_ms":50,"budget_ms":100,"status":"OK"} ], "cache_hit_rate": 0.32, "biggest_over_budget_segment": "prefill_cold", "recommendation": "Optimise prefix caching: stabilise system+tool prefix, add cache_control marker, target cache_hit_rate ≥ 0.8 (currently 0.32). Expected p95 saving: ~600ms.", "owner": "alex@faion.net", "version": "1.0.0", "produced_at": "2026-05-22T13:00:00Z" }
